+workbook-info.--include-properties: Whether to include each sheet's extended properties; default `true`

+sheet-create.--index: Insert position; appended to the end when omitted

+sheet-delete.--yes: Confirm high-risk write (exit code 10 without this flag)

+sheet-move.--source-index: Source position (0-based); optional. If omitted, the CLI runtime derives it from the current workbook index of `--sheet-id` / `--sheet-name`

+sheet-copy.--title: Copy title; auto-generated by the server when omitted
+sheet-copy.--index: Insert position for the copy (0-based); appended to the end when omitted

+sheet-set-tab-color.--color: Hex color like `#FF0000`; pass empty string `""` to clear

+workbook-create.--folder-token: Target folder token; placed at the drive root when omitted
+workbook-create.--headers: Header row as a JSON array: `["Col A","Col B"]`
+workbook-create.--values: Initial data as a 2D JSON array: `[["alice",95]]`

+workbook-export.--sheet-id: Required only in csv mode: the sheet reference_id to export
+workbook-export.--output-path: Local save path; export is triggered but not downloaded when omitted

+dim-insert.--inherit-style: Style inheritance for the new row/column: `before` (from preceding) / `after` (from following) / `none` (default)

+dim-delete.--yes: Confirm destructive write (exit code 10 without this flag); row/column deletion is irreversible

+dim-freeze.--count: Freeze the first N rows/columns; pass 0 to unfreeze

+dim-move.--target: Destination position (move target inserts before this index; 0-based)

+cells-get.--skip-hidden: Skip hidden rows and columns; default `false`

+dropdown-get.--range: Target range (A1 notation; must include the sheet prefix, e.g. `sheet1!A2:A100`)

+csv-get.--range: A1 range; reads the whole sheet's `current_region` when omitted
+csv-get.--include-row-prefix: Whether to prefix each row with `[row=N]`; default `true`
+csv-get.--skip-hidden: Skip hidden rows and columns; default `false`
+csv-get.--dry-run: Print the request path and parameters without executing

+cells-search.--find: Text to find (interpreted as regex when `--regex` is set)
+cells-search.--range: Search range (A1 notation); whole sheet when omitted

+cells-replace.--replacement: Replacement text; pass empty string `""` to delete matched content
+cells-replace.--range: Replace range (A1 notation); whole sheet when omitted
+cells-replace.--dry-run: Required preflight: outputs `would_replace_count` for user confirmation before the actual replace

+cells-set.--allow-overwrite: Allow overwriting non-empty cells; with default `false`, error if any target cell is non-empty

+cells-set-style.--number-format: Number format pattern (e.g. text `@`, number `0.00`, currency `$#,##0.00`, date `mm/dd/yyyy`)
+cells-set-style.--border-styles: Border config JSON: `{ top: {style,color,weight}, bottom: ..., left: ..., right: ... }`; same shape for all 4 sides

+cells-set-image.--range: Target cell (A1 notation; must be a single cell, e.g. `A1`; start and end must be identical)
+cells-set-image.--image: Local image path (PNG / JPEG / JPG / GIF / BMP / JFIF / EXIF / TIFF / BPG / HEIC)
+cells-set-image.--name: Image file name (with extension); defaults to the basename of `--image`

+dropdown-set.--options: Options as a JSON array, e.g. `["opt1","opt2"]`; up to 500 items, each â‰¤100 chars, no commas
+dropdown-set.--colors: RGB hex color array (e.g. `["#1FB6C1","#F006C2"]`); length must equal `--options`

+csv-put.--range: Top-left A1 anchor (e.g. `Sheet1!A1`); the bottom-right is inferred from CSV row/column counts
+csv-put.--csv: RFC 4180 CSV text; plain values only (no formulas / styles / comments)
+csv-put.--allow-overwrite: Allow overwriting; with default `false`, error if any target cell is non-empty

+cells-clear.--scope: Clear scope: `content` (default, values only) / `formats` (formats only) / `all` (values and formats)
+cells-clear.--yes: Confirm destructive write (exit code 10 without this flag); clear is irreversible

+rows-resize.--type: Sizing mode: `pixel` (explicit px value, requires `--size`) / `standard` (reset to default row height) / `auto` (fit content)
+rows-resize.--size: Row height in pixels (e.g. 30 / 40 / 60); required when `--type pixel`, ignored otherwise

+cols-resize.--type: Sizing mode: `pixel` (explicit px value, requires `--size`) / `standard` (reset to default column width)
+cols-resize.--size: Column width in pixels (e.g. 80 / 120 / 200); required when `--type pixel`, ignored otherwise

+range-move.--target-sheet-id: Destination sub-sheet id; defaults to the same sheet as the source
+range-move.--target-range: Destination A1 range (anchor cell is enough; size inferred from the source)

+range-copy.--target-sheet-id: Destination sub-sheet id; defaults to the same sheet as the source
+range-copy.--target-range: Destination A1 range (anchor cell is enough; size inferred from the source)

+range-fill.--source-range: Fill template range (seed cells for the series)

+range-sort.--range: Sort range (A1 notation; whether the header is included depends on `--has-header`)
+range-sort.--has-header: Treat the first row as a header and exclude from sort; default `false`

+batch-update.--url: Spreadsheet locator (independent from per-operation sheet locator)
+batch-update.--spreadsheet-token: Spreadsheet locator (independent from per-operation sheet locator)
+batch-update.--operations: JSON: `{"operations":[{"tool":"set_cell_range","params":{...}}, ...]}`; executed serially in array order
+batch-update.--yes: Confirm high-risk write (exit code 10 without this flag)
+batch-update.--dry-run: Print the request template for each sub-operation; no network side effects

+cells-batch-set-style.--ranges: Target ranges as a JSON array (e.g. `["sheet1!A1:B2","sheet1!D1:D10"]`); each item must include the sheet prefix; the same style is applied to all ranges
+cells-batch-set-style.--number-format: Number format pattern (e.g. text `@`, number `0.00`, currency `$#,##0.00`, date `mm/dd/yyyy`)
+cells-batch-set-style.--border-styles: Border config JSON (same shape as in +cells-set-style)

+dropdown-update.--ranges: Target ranges as a JSON array (e.g. `["sheet1!A2:A100"]`); each item must include the sheet prefix

+dropdown-delete.--ranges: Target ranges as a JSON array (up to 100 items; each must include the sheet prefix)
+dropdown-delete.--yes: Confirm high-risk write (exit code 10 without this flag)

+chart-list.--chart-id: Filter to a single chart reference_id

+chart-create.--properties: Full chart config JSON (`position` / `data` / `properties` etc.); deeply nested, must be passed as JSON
+chart-create.--dry-run: Print the request template; no side effects

+chart-update.--properties: Full or sufficiently complete chart config JSON (read back with `+chart-list` first, then patch)

+chart-delete.--yes: Confirm destructive write (exit code 10 without this flag)

+pivot-create.--target-sheet-id: Destination sub-sheet id for the pivot table; auto-creates a new sub-sheet when omitted (recommended)
+pivot-create.--target-position: Destination anchor cell (A1 notation, e.g. `A1`); default `A1`
+pivot-create.--source: Pivot table source range (A1 notation; format `SheetName!StartCell:EndCell`, e.g. `Sheet1!A1:D100`)
+pivot-create.--range: Pivot table placement (single A1 anchor for the top-left, e.g. `F1`); placed at the top-left of a newly created sub-sheet when omitted

+pivot-update.--properties: Full or sufficiently complete pivot config (read back with `+pivot-list --pivot-table-id <id>` first, then patch)

+pivot-delete.--yes: Confirm destructive write (exit code 10 without this flag); delete is irreversible

+cond-format-create.--properties: Rule config JSON: `style` (required, applied on match), `attrs?` (rule-type-dependent params), `has_ref?`. `rule_type` and `ranges` are separate flags
+cond-format-create.--rule-type: Conditional format rule type (13 values): `cellValue` / `formula` / `duplicate` / `unique` / `topBottom` / `aboveBelowAverage` / `dataBar` / `colorScale` / `iconSet` / `textContains` / `dateOccurring` / `blankCell` / `errorCell`; takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`
+cond-format-create.--ranges: A1 ranges where the conditional format applies, as a JSON array (e.g. `["A1:A100","C2:C50"]`); takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`

+cond-format-update.--properties: Rule config JSON, same shape as `+cond-format-create --properties`; update overwrites the entire rule
+cond-format-update.--rule-type: Conditional format rule type (13 values): `cellValue` / `formula` / `duplicate` / `unique` / `topBottom` / `aboveBelowAverage` / `dataBar` / `colorScale` / `iconSet` / `textContains` / `dateOccurring` / `blankCell` / `errorCell`; takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`
+cond-format-update.--ranges: A1 ranges where the conditional format applies, as a JSON array (e.g. `["A1:A100","C2:C50"]`); takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`

+cond-format-delete.--yes: Confirm destructive write (exit code 10 without this flag); delete is irreversible

+filter-create.--range: Filter range (A1 notation, including header row, e.g. `A1:F1000`); do not duplicate the range field inside `--properties`
+filter-create.--properties: Filter rule JSON: `rules` (required, per-column rule array), `filtered_columns?` (active column index hint). `range` is a separate flag (do not duplicate inside this JSON)

+filter-update.--properties: Filter rule JSON: `rules` and `filtered_columns?`; update overwrites the entire rule set (pass `rules: []` to clear). `range` is a separate flag
+filter-update.--range: Range the filter applies to (A1 notation, e.g. `A1:F1000`); takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`

+filter-delete.--yes: Confirm destructive write (exit code 10 without this flag); delete is irreversible

+filter-view-list.--view-id: Filter by filter-view reference_id (returns the matching single view)

+filter-view-create.--properties: Filter-view rule JSON: `rules?` (per-column rule array), `filtered_columns?`. `range` and `view_name` are separate flags
+filter-view-create.--range: Range the filter view applies to (A1 notation, e.g. `A1:F1000`); takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`; required on create and must cover the header row
+filter-view-create.--view-name: Filter-view name; auto-assigned by the server when omitted on create, kept unchanged when omitted on update; takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`

+filter-view-update.--properties: Filter-view rule JSON: `rules?`, `filtered_columns?`. `range` and `view_name` are separate flags; pass at least one of `--properties.rules` / `--range` / `--view-name`
+filter-view-update.--range: Range the filter view applies to (A1 notation, e.g. `A1:F1000`); takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`; omit to keep the current range on update
+filter-view-update.--view-name: Filter-view name; auto-assigned by the server when omitted on create, kept unchanged when omitted on update; takes precedence over the same-named field inside `--properties`

+filter-view-delete.--yes: Confirm high-risk write (exit code 10 without this flag)

+sparkline-create.--properties: JSON: `{"type":"line|column|winLoss","data_range":"A2:F10","target_range":"G2:G10","style":{...},"special_points":{...}}`; `type` is a 3-value enum; row/column counts of `data_range` must match `target_range`

+sparkline-update.--properties: Full or sufficiently complete sparkline config (read back with `+sparkline-list --group-id <id>` first, then patch); supports updating `type` / `data_range` / `target_range` / `style` / `special_points` etc.

+sparkline-delete.--yes: Confirm destructive write (exit code 10 without this flag); delete is irreversible

+float-image-list.--float-image-id: Filter by id; lists all float images on the sheet when omitted

+float-image-create.--image-token: Image file_token (XOR with `--image-uri`). Common source: `image_token` returned by `+float-image-list`
+float-image-create.--image-uri: Image reference_id (XOR with `--image-token`); a prefixed string like `<|image|>:abcdef`
+float-image-create.--position-row: Row anchor of the image's top-left corner (0-based)
+float-image-create.--position-col: Column anchor of the image's top-left corner (column letter, e.g. `A` / `B`)
+float-image-create.--offset-row: Pixel offset within the anchor row, on top of `--position-row`
+float-image-create.--offset-col: Pixel offset within the anchor column, on top of `--position-col`

+float-image-update.--image-token: Image file_token (XOR with `--image-uri`). Common source: `image_token` returned by `+float-image-list`
+float-image-update.--image-uri: Image reference_id (XOR with `--image-token`); a prefixed string like `<|image|>:abcdef`
+float-image-update.--position-row: Row anchor of the image's top-left corner (0-based)
+float-image-update.--position-col: Column anchor of the image's top-left corner (column letter, e.g. `A` / `B`)
+float-image-update.--offset-row: Pixel offset within the anchor row, on top of `--position-row`
+float-image-update.--offset-col: Pixel offset within the anchor column, on top of `--position-col`

+float-image-delete.--yes: Confirm destructive write (exit code 10 without this flag); delete is irreversible
